_comment: Synced MCP server registry. install.sh merges these into ~/.claude/mcp.json. Auth tokens and OAuth secrets stay machine-local in ~/.claude/.env, NEVER committed.

_template_slack._comment: Enable by removing the leading underscore on the key. Replace with real workspace slug. Token from ~/.claude/.env.

_template_granola._comment: Granola MCP. Configure once the server command + auth are available.

_template_gmail._comment: Read-only OAuth pattern. Configure once Google MCP server command is available.
